value: The project uses a custom audit logging system (agent/lib/audit.ts) that writes JSONL records to .codecare/audit.log via appendAudit(). Several tools log their operations to this file (inspect_project, run_safe_command, write_workspace_file, etc.). No console.log, console.warn, console.error, or other console.* calls exist in the codebase.
.env file exists with API keys but is properly gitignored via .gitignore (.env* pattern)
